title: salix × subversifolia
intro: Salix × subversifolia, a hybrid willow species, is a deciduous shrub or small tree known for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, which makes it effective in reducing inflammation and relieving pain. The health benefits of Salix × subversifolia include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of rheumatism and arthritis. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
